role_in_stack: Regulatory-margin realization layer for adaptive viability, synchronization, and phase transition dynamics.
core_statement: Stability in bounded adaptive systems depends on persistence-weighted regulatory margin under recursive burden.

phase_interpretation.low_margin: Increased coupling, reduced damping, synchronization pressure, dimensional compression.
phase_interpretation.negative_persistent_margin: Increased probability of regime transition or collapse.

connection_to_vtfa.accessibility_role: Regulatory margin constrains which future transformations remain recoverably accessible.
connection_to_vtfa.topology_role: Low margin may reduce traversability, bottleneck repair, and fragment recoverable accessibility connectivity.
connection_to_vtfa.collapse_role: Sustained negative margin contributes to loss of reopenable transformation geometry.

canonical_compressions: Declining margin weakens damping and increases coupling.
Mode collapse is dimensional compression under sustained deficit.
one_sentence_lock: PMM realizes recursive viability through regulatory margin, damping, coupling, and persistence-weighted burden.
